issues.description: KO action missing required condition: target must be rested. DSL specifies maxCost:5 but omits the 'isRested' condition that is explicit in card text ('rested Characters').

Entire second effect is unexplained. Card text describes a single sequential action pair (Rest → Then KO), not two separate triggers. The second Trigger effect with Rest maxCost:4 has no basis in the card text.
Rest action should specify 'up to 1' via maxTargets or similar constraint; current DSL implies unrestricted quantity.
